title: Tangy Light Vegan Avocado Wraps
description: An energizing Peruvian dish featuring light and tangy flavors with bread, made for a quick breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: Jalapeno peppers
ingredients.notes: Rinse under cold water, seeds removed

ingredients.name: Lemon juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed for the best flavor

instructions: Prepare the cilantro, avocado, and jalapeno peppers by washing them thoroughly.
In a mixing bowl, combine avocados with lemon juice and olive oil until smooth.
Fold in chopped cilantro and finely diced jalapenos. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Take one whole wheat wrap, spread half of the avocado mixture on each, top with more fresh cilantro leaves if desired.
Wrap tightly around the filling for a perfect bite-sized snack or meal.
